TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lucius_Allen, title = Lucius_Allen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Allen} }

S.FORM: Lucius Oliver Allen , Jr ga semong ppzuy mari lalu' niya' balay, 26 ryax 9 byacing 1947 kawas qu hintgan nya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq ru 79 kunkin kin'suw nya. ppzuy nya mari ga kmahang mari te suruw, tmasuq mqwas squ UCLA. Kawas te 1969, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics (maki' squ te qutux hinguwi ran na pinwzyagan na' lga maki' te cyugal binkgan lalu' niya') ryax pizyuwi'an niya' mari' ga mnaki' sa Seattle SuperSonics, Milwaukee Bucks, Los Angeles Lakers ru Sacramento Kings. kinbleqan pinzyuwi'an niya mari kawas te 9407 ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 13.4), kawas te 2205 qnol niya zikna tkran ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 3.1), kawas te 3174 rnaw nya ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya msspung ga 4.5) kinmuci' na minkirok mnagal Champion na NBA, mnagal Champion na NCAA sa kawas te (1967.1968) bniru' nha' ryax qnxan niya Kawas te 1969 ga mzyup kya NBA, 'aring kya squ ppzyuwi'an niya' mari' la. Kawas te 1971, pragan nha' squ rogak niya' sa raygak rmaw squ gluw na Milwaukee Bucks magal sa Champion na NBA. Kawas te 1979, spquzi' niyya' wagiq qu pinlukus niya niwan tmasuq kya pinzi'an niya pinzyuwi'an mari la. kawas te 1999, galan spzyang blaq balay sensyu mzyuwi' mari' na kocyu sa State of Kansas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lucius Oliver Allen , Jr ga semong ppzuy mari lalu' niya' balay, 26 ryax 9 byacing 1947 kawas qu hintgan nya. 188 kunbun kinwagiq ru 79 kunkin kin'suw nya. ppzuy nya mari ga kmahang mari te suruw, tmasuq mqwas squ UCLA. Kawas te 1969, galun nqu Seattle SuperSonics (maki' squ te qutux hinguwi ran na pinwzyagan na' lga maki' te cyugal binkgan lalu' niya') ryax pizyuwi'an niya' mari' ga mnaki' sa Seattle SuperSonics, Milwaukee Bucks, Los Angeles Lakers ru Sacramento Kings. kinbleqan pinzyuwi'an niya mari kawas te 9407 ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 13.4), kawas te 2205 qnol niya zikna tkran ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya pspung ga 3.1), kawas te 3174 rnaw nya ga (ptnaqun pspung kwara' inxalan niya msspung ga 4.5) kinmuci' na minkirok mnagal Champion na NBA, mnagal Champion na NCAA sa kawas te (1967.1968) bniru' nha' ryax qnxan niya Kawas te 1969 ga mzyup kya NBA, 'aring kya squ ppzyuwi'an niya' mari' la. Kawas te 1971, pragan nha' squ rogak niya' sa raygak rmaw squ gluw na Milwaukee Bucks magal sa Champion na NBA. Kawas te 1979, spquzi' niyya' wagiq qu pinlukus niya niwan tmasuq kya pinzi'an niya pinzyuwi'an mari la. kawas te 1999, galan spzyang blaq balay sensyu mzyuwi' mari' na kocyu sa State of Kansas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: luʦ~ʨius~ɕ oli*er allen , *r ɣa s~ɕemoŋ ppzuj mari laluʔ nijaʔ βalaj, ** rjax * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ **** kawas~ɕ qu ħintɣan nja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq ru ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja. ppzuj nja mari ɣa kmaħaŋ mari te s~ɕuruw, tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ s~ɕqu uʦ~ʨla. kawas~ɕ te ****, ɣalun nqu s~ɕeattle s~ɕupers~ɕoniʦ~ʨs~ɕ (makiʔ s~ɕqu te qutux ħiŋuwi ran na pinwzjaɣan naʔ lɣa makiʔ te ʦ~ʨjuɣal βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ) rjax pizjuwiʔan nijaʔ mariʔ ɣa mnakiʔ s~ɕa s~ɕeattle s~ɕupers~ɕoniʦ~ʨs~ɕ, milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ, los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ lakers~ɕ ru s~ɕaʦ~ʨramento kiŋs~ɕ. kinβleqan pinzjuwiʔan nija mari kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa (ptnaqun ps~ɕpuŋ kwaraʔ inxalan nija ps~ɕpuŋ ɣa **.*), kawas~ɕ te **** qnol nija zikna tkran ɣa (ptnaqun ps~ɕpuŋ kwaraʔ inxalan nija ps~ɕpuŋ ɣa *.*), kawas~ɕ te **** rnaw nja ɣa (ptnaqun ps~ɕpuŋ kwaraʔ inxalan nija ms~ɕs~ɕpuŋ ɣa *.*) kinmuʦ~ʨiʔ na minkirok mnaɣal ʦ~ʨħampion na nβa, mnaɣal ʦ~ʨħampion na nʦ~ʨaa s~ɕa kawas~ɕ te (****.****) βniruʔ nħaʔ rjax qnxan nija kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa mzjup kja nβa, ʔariŋ kja s~ɕqu ppzjuwiʔan nijaʔ mariʔ la. kawas~ɕ te ****, praɣan nħaʔ s~ɕqu roɣak nijaʔ s~ɕa rajɣak rmaw s~ɕqu ɣluw na milwaukee βuʦ~ʨks~ɕ maɣal s~ɕa ʦ~ʨħampion na nβa. kawas~ɕ te ****, s~ɕpquziʔ nijjaʔ waɣiq qu pinlukus~ɕ nija niwan tmas~ɕuq kja pinziʔan nija pinzjuwiʔan mari la. kawas~ɕ te ****, ɣalan s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq βalaj s~ɕens~ɕju mzjuwiʔ mariʔ na koʦ~ʨju s~ɕa s~ɕtate o* kans~ɕas~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
